summary: Iteration 37 - Agents Page Update with American Names - ALL FEATURES PASSED. Verified: (1) Agents page at /agents with 25 marketplace agents showing American names, (2) Agent names correctly updated: Sarah (sales), James (support), Emily (scheduling), Ryan (sac), Olivia (onboarding), Emma (ecommerce sales), Daniel (ecommerce support), Madison (real estate), etc., (3) Personal agents: Alex, Luna, Max with PRO badge, (4) Compact card layout with 36px cyborg avatars, Details and Deploy buttons, (5) 'Criar Agente' button in top-right with avatar image navigates to /agents/builder, (6) Tab switcher shows 'Marketplace (25)' and 'Meus (N)' counts, (7) All 7 filter chips working (Todos/Vendas/Suporte/Agenda/SAC/Onboarding/Pessoal), (8) Search filters by name/description, (9) Bottom nav has 7 items including Marketing (Megaphone icon), (10) Deploy button works - tested James deployment with 'James deployed!' toast, (11) My Agents tab shows deployed agents with ON/OFF status badges.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 - existing issue, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is excellent - all American names properly implemented in backend constants.py
Frontend correctly reads names from API /api/agents/marketplace which returns {agents: [], plan: ''}
Avatar mapping in agentAvatars.js correctly maps American names to cyborg images
Create Agent button correctly uses DEFAULT_AVATAR for avatar image
Rich system prompts implemented with professional guidelines (SPIN selling, HEART method, etc.)
seed_data_creation: Deployed James agent via Deploy button test
